prompt:
Finish a fix a previous agent verified but never committed. classic-laddie's system build is broken on cosmo main: python3.14-catppuccin-2.5.0 (dependency of catppuccin-gtk-1.0.3, used by the desktop theming) fails pythonImportsCheck with 'AttributeError: module matplotlib.style has no attribute core' — matplotlib 3.11 removed mpl.style.core, catppuccin 2.5.0's matplotlib extra still calls it. This blocks all deploys on classic-laddie.

THE FIX (already researched and eval-verified by the previous agent — reproduce it): nixpkgs master already fixed this in commit 894acc94f63aae4b9483cf5d9f64c183398e2454 ('catppuccin-gtk: fix build with python314+', 2026-07-11), which is NOT yet on the nixos-unstable channel cosmo pins. Mirror it locally:
1. Download the patch from that commit into modules/common/patches/catppuccin-gtk-python-3.14.patch:
   curl -sf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NixOS/nixpkgs/894acc94f63aae4b9483cf5d9f64c183398e2454/pkgs/by-name/ca/catppuccin-gtk/python-3.14.patch
   (If that exact path 404s, fetch the commit via 'gh api repos/nixos/nixpkgs/commits/894acc94f6' and reconstruct — mirror whatever the upstream fix does.)
2. In modules/common/desktop.nix, override the catppuccin-gtk package to apply the patch the same way the nixpkgs commit does (the previous agent used an .override/.overrideAttrs chain through the python env; find where catppuccin-gtk enters the config — grep modules/ and home/ for catppuccin — and apply minimally).
3. Add a comment: remove this override once the nixpkgs pin includes 894acc94f6 (the daily flake.lock update will bring it within days).

VERIFICATION — the critical part, and why the last run failed to finish: run 'nix build .#nixosConfigurations.classic-laddie.config.system.build.toplevel --no-link' IN THE FOREGROUND and wait for it to complete successfully (much of the closure is already in this machine's store from the previous attempt, so it should be minutes, not hours). Do NOT push the build to a background task and end your turn while it runs — the previous agent did exactly that and its run terminated before committing anything. After the build succeeds: nix flake check, then commit, push, and open the PR.

PR body: root cause (traceback summary above), the fix = local mirror of nixpkgs 894acc94f6 pending the channel catching up, upstream refs (catppuccin/python#129, fix PR catppuccin/python#130), full local toplevel build succeeded (CI only dry-runs — state this explicitly), and the deploy note: after merge someone runs 'sudo systemctl start cosmo-rebuild' once on classic-laddie to bootstrap the auto-rebuild loop.
